---
title: "No influence of face familiarity on the cheerleader effect"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Javorkova, N., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2024
date: 2024-01-01
pub-journal: "Visual Cognition"
volume: "1–11"
doi: "10.1080/13506285.2024.2405700"
pdf: "assets/papers/2024/kramerjavorkovajones2024.pdf"
categories: [attractiveness]
---
